news.t: Here's the long-term case for investing in producers of oil and natural gas
Pacer ETFs Announces Dividend Increase for Pacer American Energy Independence ETF (USAI)
Best Oil and Gas ETFs for Q1 2020

holdings.infoBox: USAI is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Enbridge stock at 7.91%, TC Energy at 7.91%, Energy Transfer LP at 7.60%, The Williams Companies at 7.44%, and Enterprise Products Partners at 7.42%.

overview.description: The Pacer American Energy Infrastructure ETF (USAI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the American Energy Infrastructure index. The fund tracks an index of US and Canadian midstream energy infrastructure companies and MLPs. Selection and weighting of holdings is based on revenue tied to the space and a modified market-cap. USAI was launched on Dec 13, 2017 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Here's the long-term case for investing in producers of oil and natural gas
data.text: The Iran conflict underscores U.S. energy producers' advantages, especially for liquefied natural gas exports.

data.title: Pacer ETFs Announces Dividend Increase for Pacer American Energy Independence ETF (USAI)
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs Announces Dividend Increase for Pacer American Energy Independence ETF (USAI).

data.title: Best Oil and Gas ETFs for Q1 2020
data.text: The best oil and gas ETFs for Q1 2020 are EMLP, USAI, and MLPX.
